_comment: Loom hooks — merge the `hooks` block into your ~/.claude/settings.json. Uses python3 from PATH and ~/.claude relative paths. codex-gate is intentionally omitted here (optional, needs the codex CLI) — see INSTALL.md.
_outputStyle_comment: To use an output style, set the value to the style's name (the filename in output-styles/ without .md), e.g. "concise-readable". Leave it null for Claude's default behavior.
